rumor.detail: Visa/docs processing ongoing. Frankfurt U17 move imminent once German paperwork received.

newIntel.reasoning: Date Feb 10, 2026 is after latest existing rumour (Feb 12 visa update). Clarifies current status of Frankfurt move with fresh confirmation of visa delays and imminent U17 integration.

rumor.detail: Rob Page: Building fitness gradually, expect to see him in next couple weeks in U21s.

newIntel.reasoning: Mar 9, 2026 is after latest existing rumour (Mar 9 training update). Direct quote from Rob Page provides concrete timeline (next 2 weeks) for U21s debut—more definitive than previous medical-focused reports.

rumor.detail: Watford leading race. Club official visited Senegal this week. Sétif, Fenerbahçe interest fading.

newIntel.reasoning: Mar 12, 2026 is after latest existing rumour (Feb 15 Fenerbahçe). Major shift: Watford now leads race with official delegation visit this week, superseding previous Fenerbahçe momentum from February. Significant competitive development.

rumor.detail: 8 goals/1 assist in 17 L1 apps. Fenerbahçe, Watford, Guingamp, Sétif all pursuing summer move.
